title: Matsuyama,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Matsuyama, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Matsuyama is a city in with a population of 515,000. The largest city on Shikoku, with one of Japan’s oldest hot spring resorts and a magnificent original castle.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
